<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Mac's Place | Silverton, OR</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;0,900;1,400&family=Lato:wght@300;400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --wood: #3b1f0a;
    --gold: #c9973a;
    --green: #2a6b3a;
    --cream: #f5f0e8;
    --dark: #1a1008;
    --text: #2c1a0a;
    --light-green: #d4e8d4;
  }
  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
  body { font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif; background: var(--dark); color: var(--cream); overflow-x: hidden; }

  /* NAV */
  nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; width: 100%; z-index: 100;
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
    padding: 18px 40px;
    background: rgba(26,16,8,0.92);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,151,58,0.3);
    transition: all 0.3s;
  }
  .nav-logo { height: 52px; }
  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 32px; list-style: none; }
  .nav-links a {
    color: var(--cream); text-decoration: none;
    font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 2px;
    font-size: 12px; text-transform: uppercase;
    transition: color 0.3s;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--gold); }
  .nav-cta {
    background: var(--gold); color: var(--dark) !important;
    padding: 10px 22px; border-radius: 2px;
  }
  .nav-cta:hover { background: var(--cream); color: var(--dark) !important; }

  /* HERO */
  .hero {
    height: 100vh; position: relative;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hero-bg {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background-image: url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');
    background-size: cover; background-position: center;
    transform: scale(1.08);
    animation: heroZoom 14s ease-out forwards;
  }
  @keyframes heroZoom { to { transform: scale(1); } }
  .hero-overlay {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(26,16,8,0.6) 0%, rgba(26,16,8,0.45) 50%, rgba(26,16,8,0.85) 100%);
  }
  .hero-content { position: relative; text-align: center; padding: 0 20px; }
  .hero-logo {
    height: 140px; margin-bottom: 28px;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.6));
    animation: fadeUp 1s 0.2s both;
  }
  .hero-tagline {
    font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif; font-weight: 300; letter-spacing: 5px;
    font-size: 13px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold);
    margin-bottom: 18px;
    animation: fadeUp 1s 0.4s both;
  }
  .hero-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: clamp(52px, 8vw, 96px);
    font-weight: 900; line-height: 1.0; color: var(--cream);
    animation: fadeUp 1s 0.6s both;
  }
  .hero-subtitle {
    margin-top: 16px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 300; color: rgba(245,240,232,0.8);
    max-width: 480px; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; line-height: 1.7;
    animation: fadeUp 1s 0.8s both;
  }
  .hero-buttons {
    margin-top: 40px; display: flex; gap: 16px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap;
    animation: fadeUp 1s 1s both;
  }
  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--gold); color: var(--dark);
    padding: 15px 36px; border: none; cursor: pointer;
    font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 2px;
    font-size: 12px; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.3s; display: inline-block;
  }
  .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--cream); transform: translateY(-2px); }
  .btn-outline {
    background: transparent; color: var(--cream);
    padding: 14px 36px; border: 1.5px solid rgba(245,240,232,0.5); cursor: pointer;
    font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 2px;
    font-size: 12px; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.3s; display: inline-block;
  }
  .btn-outline:hover { border-color: var(--gold); color: var(--gold); transform: translateY(-2px); }
  .scroll-hint {
    position: absolute; bottom: 32px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
    animation: fadeUp 1s 1.4s both, bounce 2s 2.4s infinite;
    color: rgba(245,240,232,0.5); font-size: 22px; cursor: pointer;
  }
  @keyframes bounce { 0%,100% { transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0); } 50% { transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(8px); } }
  @keyframes fadeUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }

  /* SECTIONS */
  section { padding: 90px 40px; }
  .section-inner { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .section-label {
    font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 4px;
    font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold);
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }
  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: clamp(32px, 5vw, 52px);
    font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.1; color: var(--cream);
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }
  .divider {
    width: 60px; height: 2px; background: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 32px;
  }

  /* ABOUT STRIP */
  .about-strip {
    background: var(--green);
    padding: 28px 40px; text-align: center;
  }
  .about-strip p {
    font-size: 16px; font-weight: 300; letter-spacing: 1px;
    color: var(--cream); max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto; line-height: 1.8;
  }
  .about-strip strong { color: var(--gold); font-weight: 700; }

  /* ABOUT SECTION */
  .about-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 60px; align-items: center;
  }
  .about-image-wrap { position: relative; }
  .about-img {
    width: 100%; height: 460px; object-fit: cover;
    display: block; border-radius: 2px;
    box-shadow: 16px 16px 0 var(--green);
  }
  .about-badge {
    position: absolute; bottom: -20px; right: -20px;
    background: var(--gold); color: var(--dark);
    width: 110px; height: 110px; border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-weight: 900; font-size: 13px; text-align: center; line-height: 1.2;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
  }
  .about-text p { font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.9; color: rgba(245,240,232,0.85); margin-bottom: 18px; }
  .hours-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 12px; margin-top: 28px; }
  .hours-item {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border-left: 3px solid var(--gold);
    padding: 14px 18px; border-radius: 2px;
  }
  .hours-item .day { font-weight: 700; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); }
  .hours-item .time { font-size: 14px; color: var(--cream); margin-top: 4px; }

  /* PATIO SECTION */
  .patio-section { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); }
  .patio-layout { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 60px; align-items: center; }
  .patio-text { order: 2; }
  .patio-image-wrap { order: 1; }
  .patio-img {
    width: 100%; height: 420px; object-fit: cover;
    border-radius: 2px;
    box-shadow: -16px 16px 0 rgba(42,107,58,0.4);
  }
  .feature-list { list-style: none; margin-top: 28px; }
  .feature-list li {
    padding: 12px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px;
    font-size: 15px; color: rgba(245,240,232,0.85);
  }
  .feature-list li::before { content: '✦'; color: var(--gold); font-size: 10px; }

  /* MENU SECTION */
  .menu-section { background: var(--wood); }
  .menu-tabs {
    display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 40px;
  }
  .menu-tab {
    padding: 10px 24px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,151,58,0.2); color: var(--cream);
    cursor: pointer; font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif; font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;
    transition: all 0.3s; border-radius: 2px;
  }
  .menu-tab.active, .menu-tab:hover {
    background: var(--gold); color: var(--dark); border-color: var(--gold);
  }
  .menu-panel { display: none; }
  .menu-panel.active { display: block; animation: fadeUp 0.4s ease; }
  .menu-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(300px, 1fr)); gap: 2px; }
  .menu-category { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); padding: 28px; }
  .menu-category h3 {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 18px;
    color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 18px;
    padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,151,58,0.3);
  }
  .menu-item { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline; padding: 9px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); }
  .menu-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .item-name { font-size: 14px; color: var(--cream); font-weight: 400; flex: 1; }
  .item-desc { font-size: 12px; color: rgba(245,240,232,0.5); margin-top: 2px; }
  .item-price { font-size: 14px; color: var(--gold); font-weight: 700; white-space: nowrap; margin-left: 12px; }
  .menu-note {
    margin-top: 28px; padding: 18px 24px;
    background: rgba(42,107,58,0.2); border-left: 3px solid var(--green);
    border-radius: 2px; font-size: 14px; color: rgba(245,240,232,0.7);
    font-style: italic;
  }

  /* MUSIC BANNER */
  .music-banner {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--green) 0%, #1a4726 100%);
    padding: 60px 40px; text-align: center;
  }
  .music-banner h2 {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: clamp(28px, 4vw, 48px);
    font-weight: 900; color: var(--cream); margin-bottom: 12px;
  }
  .music-banner p { font-size: 16px; color: rgba(245,240,232,0.8); max-width: 500px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .music-icon { font-size: 48px; margin-bottom: 16px; }

  /* CONTACT PAGE */
  #contact { background: var(--dark); padding-top: 120px; }
  .contact-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 60px; }
  .contact-info h3 {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 24px;
    color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 28px;
  }
  .contact-detail {
    display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: flex-start;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }
  .contact-icon { font-size: 22px; color: var(--gold); margin-top: 2px; }
  .contact-detail-text strong { display: block; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 4px; }
  .contact-detail-text span { font-size: 16px; color: rgba(245,240,232,0.85); line-height: 1.6; }
  .contact-form { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); padding: 40px; border-radius: 2px; }
  .contact-form h3 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 24px; color: var(--cream); margin-bottom: 28px; }
  .form-group { margin-bottom: 20px; }
  .form-group label {
    display: block; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 8px; font-weight: 700;
  }
  .form-group input, .form-group textarea, .form-group select {
    width: 100%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,151,58,0.2); color: var(--cream);
    padding: 13px 16px; font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif; font-size: 15px;
    border-radius: 2px; transition: border 0.3s; outline: none;
  }
  .form-group input:focus, .form-group textarea:focus, .form-group select:focus {
    border-color: var(--gold);
  }
  .form-group select option { background: var(--dark); }
  .form-group textarea { min-height: 130px; resize: vertical; }
  .form-success {
    display: none; background: rgba(42,107,58,0.2);
    border: 1px solid var(--green); padding: 18px;
    border-radius: 2px; color: #8ecf8e; text-align: center;
    margin-top: 16px; font-size: 15px;
  }

  /* MAP */
  .map-embed {
    width: 100%; height: 340px; border: none; border-radius: 2px;
    margin-top: 32px; filter: grayscale(30%) contrast(1.1);
  }

  /* FOOTER */
  footer {
    background: #0d0805; padding: 50px 40px 30px;
    text-align: center; border-top: 1px solid rgba(201,151,58,0.2);
  }
  .footer-logo { height: 60px; margin-bottom: 20px; opacity: 0.85; }
  .footer-links { display: flex; gap: 24px; justify-content: center; list-style: none; margin-bottom: 20px; }
  .footer-links a { color: rgba(245,240,232,0.5); text-decoration: none; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; transition: color 0.3s; }
  .footer-links a:hover { color: var(--gold); }
  .footer-copy { font-size: 12px; color: rgba(245,240,232,0.3); }

  /* PAGE SWITCHING */
  .page { display: none; }
  .page.active { display: block; }

  /* FADE IN */
  .fade-in { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); transition: opacity 0.7s, transform 0.7s; }
  .fade-in.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }

  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    nav { padding: 14px 20px; }
    .nav-links { gap: 18px; }
    .nav-links li:nth-child(2) { display: none; }
    section { padding: 60px 20px; }
    .about-grid, .patio-layout, .contact-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; }
    .patio-text { order: 1; }
    .patio-image-wrap { order: 2; }
    .about-badge { right: 10px; bottom: 10px; }
    .hours-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .hero-logo { height: 90px; }
    .about-img, .patio-img { height: 280px; }
    footer { padding: 40px 20px 24px; }
    .contact-form { padding: 24px; }
    .footer-links { flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 14px; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav id="navbar">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Mac's Place Logo" class="nav-logo">
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#" onclick="showPage('home')">Home</a></li>
    <li><a href="#about" onclick="showPage('home'); setTimeout(()=>scrollTo('#about'),100)">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#menu" onclick="showPage('home'); setTimeout(()=>scrollTo('#menu'),100)">Menu</a></li>
    <li><a href="#" onclick="showPage('contact')" class="nav-cta">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- HOME PAGE -->
<div id="page-home" class="page active">

  <!-- HERO -->
  <section class="hero" id="home">
    <div class="hero-bg"></div>
    <div class="hero-overlay"></div>
    <div class="hero-content">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Mac's Place" class="hero-logo">
      <p class="hero-tagline">Silverton, Oregon · Est. in the Heart of Town</p>
      <h1 class="hero-title">Mac's Place</h1>
      <p class="hero-subtitle">Your convivial neighborhood spot — American comfort food, live music & a patio with creek views.</p>
      <div class="hero-buttons">
        <a href="#menu" class="btn-primary" onclick="scrollTo('#menu')">View Our Menu</a>
        <a href="#" class="btn-outline" onclick="showPage('contact')">Find Us</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="scroll-hint" onclick="scrollTo('#about')">↓</div>
  </section>

  <!-- INFO STRIP -->
  <div class="about-strip">
    <p>📍 <strong>201 N Water St, Silverton, OR</strong> &nbsp;·&nbsp; 📞 <strong>(503) 873-2441</strong> &nbsp;·&nbsp; 🍳 <strong>Breakfast Fri–Sat, 9am–Noon</strong></p>
  </div>

  <!-- ABOUT -->
  <section id="about" style="background: var(--dark);">
    <div class="section-inner">
      <div class="about-grid">
        <div class="about-image-wrap fade-in">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64,
